title: fresh entity textures
description: this texture pack adds new entity textures to your game!
body:
![FET](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0600ebb677775b8277c3f1c306dcaca04563c459.png)
# F.E.T.
Why should the world of Minecraft feel so static? Fresh Entity Textures is a comprehensive resource pack designed to shatter the "clone" feel of the game's mobs. By staying strictly within the pixel-art aesthetic, this pack provides a massive visual upgrade.

## Available on
[![CurseForge](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/184de7d56945a6412accd3de69ecc948e3795cab.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/fresh-entity-textures)
![to](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/69ab5455887de4967cfbcbad238be13409ba3a0e.png)
[![modrinth](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ab59b323749cdde88a44a7018d8c893f13bcc239.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-entity-textures)

## 🎨 Enhanced Textures
Fresh Entity Textures doesn't try to turn the game into a high-res horror movie. Instead, it polishes the "soul" of the game:

Color Theory Focused: Vibrant, intentional palettes that make mobs pop against the terrain.

## ℹ️ About Creator
hi my name is _UU_. i love making mods and other things inside minecraft. like this one that i made. i spend so much time so i will be happy if you will support me. ```i recomend use fresh animations with F.E.T.```. thanks for listening.

## 📋 Instruction
![EMF](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/27f6bbf8bba7b777552bd2cc6688d76f36b69159_0.webp)
![ETF](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4a9fe8d33f8dcc4a61abf23919d9c04871f41937.png)

1. install [EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features)
2. install [ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)

## ⚠️ EMF & ETF Requirements
[EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) and [ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) are rquired for that resourcepack if you not gonna install it some things can work incorrectly!

## 📜 Permissions
you can use this resourcepack in your modpacks but you can upload it to other mod libraries but if you pretend you are creator. i can report you for copyright.
